```{r report-setup, include=FALSE}
`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x) || length(x) == 0) y else x
source("R/report_helpers.R")
source("R/config.R")
source("R/catalog.R")
load_report_context("report-config.yml")
```

```{r draft-watermark, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (isTRUE(draft_watermark) && isTRUE(knitr::is_html_output())) {
  cat("```{=html}\n")
  cat("<script>\n")
  cat("document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function () {\n")
  cat("  document.body.classList.add(\"draft-watermark\");\n")
  cat(sprintf("  document.body.setAttribute(\"data-watermark\", \"%s\");\n", html_escape(watermark_text)))
  cat("});\n")
  cat("</script>\n")
  cat("```\n")
}
```

```{r config-warnings, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
emit_config_warnings()
```

\newpage

<!-- Executive summary -->

```{r Summary, child='sections/Executive_summary.qmd'}
```

\newpage

<!-- Introduction -->

```{r Introduction, child='sections/Introduction.qmd'}
```

<!-- Methods -->

```{r Methods, child='sections/Methods.qmd'}
```

<!-- Results -->

```{r Results, child='sections/Results.qmd'}
```

<!-- Discussion -->

```{r Discussion, child='sections/Discussion.qmd'}
```

<!-- Conclusion -->

```{r Conclusion, child='sections/Conclusion.qmd'}
```

<!-- Acknowledgments -->

```{r Acknowledgments, child='sections/Acknowledgments.qmd'}
```

\newpage

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

\newpage

```{=html}
<br>
```

<!-- Tables -->

```{r Tables, child='sections/Tables.qmd'}
```

<!-- Figures -->

```{r Figures, child='sections/Figures.qmd'}
```
